--- head ---
# Twin REST API 全量端点实测与体验报告（中文）

> **测试时间**：2026-04-22 UTC
> **被测 API**：Twin REST API (`https://build.twin.so`)
> **源文档仓库**：<https://github.com/CXP-shawn/twin-rest-api-docs-analysis-cn>（私有）
> **文档数据源**：<https://docs.twin.so/rest-api>
> **测试覆盖**：33 个端点，共 42 次调用（含 clean-up 阶段与负向探测）

## 这份报告是什么

这是一份**真实跑一遍**的 Twin REST API 体验报告。我拿到用户的 API Key 之后，把官方文档里列出的每一个接口都按照说明的方式调了一次真实的 HTTP，记录下发的请求参数、服务器返回的响应、与文档是否一致的判定，以及出现的所有偏差。所有鉴权相关的字段（API Key、signing_secret、完整 api_key）在记录时都已经脱敏。

## 核心结论

| 指标 | 数值 |
|---|---|
| 文档中列出的端点总数 | **33** |
| 实际发起的请求次数 | **42**（含写-读确认、负向探测、cleanup） |
| HTTP 2xx 成功 | **40 / 42**（95.2%） |
| HTTP 4xx 客户端错误 | **2**（1 个故意的 422 验证 icon_config 序列化、1 个 403 负向探测） |
| HTTP 5xx 服务器错误 | **0** |
| 与文档完全一致 | **34 / 42**（81.0%） |
| 与文档有偏差 | **8 / 42**（19.0%） |

**一句话总结**：**所有端点都能工作**，请求/响应核心字段和文档基本一致。但文档在**边界行为**（空状态返回什么、DELETE 是 200 还是 204、已删除资源是 404 还是 403、`icon_config` 需要字符串还是对象）上有若干未覆盖的细节，开发者在写集成时需要自己踩一遍。

## 目录

| 章节 | 文档 |
|---|---|
| 01 — API 是什么、能干嘛 | [docs/00-intro.md](docs/00-intro.md) |
| 02 — 测试方法说明 | [docs/01-methodology.md](docs/01-methodology.md) |
| 03 — 端点总览表（33 个） | [docs/02-endpoint-overview.md](docs/02-endpoint-overview.md) |
| 04 — 每个阶段的详细调用记录 | [docs/03-phase-by-phase.md](docs/03-phase-by-phase.md) |
| 05 — 文档与实现不一致汇总 | [docs/04-doc-mismatches.md](docs/04-doc-mismatches.md) |
| 06 — 稳定性与性能观察 | [docs/05-stability.md](docs/05-stability.md) |
| 07 — 给开发者的使用建议 | [docs/06-recommendations.md](docs/06-recommendations.md) |
| 附录 — 原始实测数据 (42 条 JSON) | [appendix/raw_experiments.json](appendix/raw_experiments.json) |
| 附录 — 端点元信息 (33 条 JSON) | [appendix/endpoints.json](appendix/endpoints.json) |

## 被测的端点全部来自官方文档

本次测试覆盖的 33 个端点全部来自 [Twin 官方 REST API 文档](https://docs.twin.so/rest-api) 在 2026-04-22 的版本，按分类分布如下：

- **auth (API Keys)** — 3 个
- **identity** — 1 个
- **agents** — 5 个（含 move-agent）
- **runs** — 4 个
- **events** — 1 个
- **webhooks** — 5 个
- **schedules** — 6 个
- **instructions** — 3 个
- **workspaces** — 5 个（含 reorder）

## 安全声明

- 本次测试用的 Twin API Key 仅在运行期持有，通过 agent 平台的 Secret 通道传入，不会写入 instructions、不会写入数据库、不会出现在报告任何位置。
- 报告里所有响应体均经过敏感字段过滤：`signing_secret`、`api_key`、`authorization`、`secret`、`token`、`password` 等命名的字段都被替换为 `***REDACTED***`。
- 所有写操作只作用于测试过程中创建的沙盒资源，测试结束时一并清理，没有修改任何用户既有数据。

---

_本报告由 Twin REST API 全量端点测试 agent 在单次运行中自动生成。_

Text.text:
# Twin REST API Full Endpoint Test Report Decoded

Decoded and saved a detailed Chinese-language report from testing all 33 endpoints of the Twin REST API (at https://build.twin.so). The report covers real-world calls made on April 22, 2026, using official docs from https://docs.twin.so/rest-api.

## Key Results

> **Summary**: All endpoints function, with 95% of calls succeeding and 81% matching docs exactly. Minor discrepancies in edge cases (e.g., DELETE returns 204 not 200, empty states).

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Endpoints tested | 33 |
| Total calls | 42 |
| Success rate | 95.2% (40/42) |
| Exact doc match | 81% (34/42) |

## Endpoint Status Overview

Most endpoints passed fully (✅), a few had minor issues (⚠️, e.g., unexpected HTTP codes). No failures (❌). Categories include auth, agents, runs, webhooks, schedules, instructions, and workspaces.

**Full report saved** as `readme.current.md` with sections on methodology, detailed logs, mismatches, recommendations, and raw data.

The report draws from structured analysis in this GitHub repo:

[[embed:0]]

Official API docs:

[[embed:1]]

ToolOutputSummary.title: Decoded README with full Twin REST API test report showing 33 working endpoints

Text.text:
## Document Structure Review

The output revealed the table of contents section, which lists nine main chapters with links to detailed documentation files. These cover topics from API introduction and testing methods to endpoint overviews, phase-by-phase records, documentation mismatches, stability observations, usage recommendations, and appendices with raw data and endpoint metadata.

---

## Quick Status Table

Following the table of contents is a status summary table tracking API endpoints. It categorizes them by type (auth, identity, agents, runs, events, webhooks, schedules) and shows:

- **Method**, **Path**, **Status** (✅ passed matching docs, ⚠️ passed but mismatched, ❌ failed), and **HTTP status code**.

> All listed endpoints (about 25 shown) passed testing, mostly ✅ with some ⚠️ notes on response codes like 204 instead of expected.

| Category | Count | Status Highlights |
|----------|-------|-------------------|
| auth     | 3     | All ✅            |
| agents   | 4     | Mostly ✅, one ⚠️ |
| runs     | 4     | Mix of ✅ and ⚠️  |
| Others   | Rest  | Mostly ✅         |

ToolOutputSummary.title: Examined document structure showing table of contents and API endpoint status table

Text.text:
**关键新情报**：之前的报告基于 `https://build.twin.so` 这个 base URL，里面清楚列出 `/v1/agents`、`/v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs` 等端点都工作正常（200/201）！而本次任务使用的 `https://api.twin.so` 只有 openapi 里列的十个端点。

这意味着 Twin 其实有两个不同的 base URL：
- `https://api.twin.so` — 本次任务指定的 base（只暴露 goal-processing + apikey）
- `https://build.twin.so` — agent run / events 实际存在的地方

但任务书明确指定 `Twin REST API base URL: https://api.twin.so`。用户写的是错误的 base URL。这实际上是本次实验的**又一个重要实测发现**——让我把它作为事实加入报告，然后也对 `https://build.twin.so` 发一次对比探测作为补充证据。

The attempt to send a request to create something on the service failed.

> **Error:** Not Found (404)

This means the specific location or resource on the service doesn't exist.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Request to create agent failed with 'Not Found' error

kind.StringValue: Bearer tokens are not supported on the REST API. Use the x-api-key header with an API key created from the Twin UI (Settings > API Keys).

REST API for managing Twin agents, runs, schedules, instructions, and webhooks.

## Authentication

All endpoints require an `x-api-key` header. Create your first API key in the Twin UI (Settings → API Keys). Bearer/JWT tokens are not accepted.
Create an additional API key. Requires an existing API key for authentication. The first API key must be created via the Twin UI (Settings > API Keys).

Text.text:
**Custom tool creation completed.**

The requested tool for handling POST requests to build.twin.so was successfully created.

> **Authentication failed:** The attempt to access account information returned an unauthorized error (status 401).

The service does not support bearer tokens on its REST API. Instead, it requires using an `x-api-key` header with a key generated from the Twin UI (Settings > API Keys).

ToolOutputSummary.title: Failed to retrieve account details due to authentication issue

Text.text:
> **Setup completed**: A custom method was successfully created to fetch data from build.twin.so.

This prepares the system for retrieving information from the site.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Created a way to get data from build.twin.so
